title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Milkbasket - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Milkbasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
